name: security-engine
description: OctoBus package for Crowdsec Security Engine LAPI — alerts, decisions, IP block/unblock.

Crowdsec_SECURITY_ENGINE.Crowdsec_SECURI.name: get-alert
Crowdsec_SECURITY_ENGINE.Crowdsec_SECURI.description: Get a Crowdsec alert by ID.

Crowdsec_SECURITY_ENGINE.Crowdsec_SECURI.name: block-ip
Crowdsec_SECURITY_ENGINE.Crowdsec_SECURI.description: Block an IP address by creating a manual Crowdsec decision.

Crowdsec_SECURITY_ENGINE.Crowdsec_SECURI.name: unblock-ip
Crowdsec_SECURITY_ENGINE.Crowdsec_SECURI.description: Unblock an IP address by deleting matching Crowdsec decisions.

Crowdsec_SECURITY_ENGINE.Crowdsec_SECURI.name: delete-decision
Crowdsec_SECURITY_ENGINE.Crowdsec_SECURI.description: Delete a specific Crowdsec decision by ID.
